summary: This document outlines general prompt engineering best practices alongside specific design requirements for the AI model's memory architecture. It distinguishes between static user data (name, profession) and dynamic health variables (e.g., having a cold) that should expire over time. Located in a deprecated prototype folder, it reflects early product design decisions regarding user data handling.
